initialization.description: Initializes panel opening functionality for left sidebar items

expanded.description: Hover state - shows icons and text labels
expanded.disabledWhen: data-panel-open='true' (hover expansion disabled when panel is open)

panelOpen.description: Indicates that a panel is currently open from this sidebar. When true, hover expansion is disabled.

activeItem.description: Identifies which sidebar item opened the current panel

eventHandlers.description: Opens left ShellPanel when item with data-panel-title is clicked
actions: Extract panel config from data attributes (title, icon, contentId, useGradientHeader)
Detect if Dela AI item (title === 'Dela AI')
Update panel icon (clone from item or use data-panel-icon)
Add default demo content if content area is empty
Clear all active items, set data-active='true' on clicked item

eventHandlers.description: Closes left panel and resets sidebar state
actions: Clear all active items (data-active and class-based active)

data-panel-title.purpose: Stores panel title to display when item is clicked
data-panel-title.description: If missing, item uses default link behavior

data-panel-icon.purpose: Stores icon name for panel header
data-panel-icon.fallback: Uses item's icon if not provided

data-panel-content-id.purpose: Stores content identifier for contextual content

data-use-gradient-header.purpose: Indicates panel should use gradient header background
data-use-gradient-header.description: Also automatically applied for Dela AI items

data-panel-open.purpose: Indicates sidebar has an open panel

data-active.clearedBy: LeftSidebar when panel closes or another item is clicked

external: ShellPanel component (must exist in DOM as .shell-panel--left)

cssHoverExpansion.description: Sidebar expands from collapsed (52px) to expanded (220px) on hover - applies to all themes (cp, vp, ppm, maconomy)

hoverState.transition: width 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, visibility 0.2s ease
hoverState.description: Expanded state on hover - shows icons and text labels

panelOpenState.description: When panel is open, hover expansion is disabled - sidebar stays collapsed at 52px

sectionStyling.default: Sections have background, border, shadow, and border-radius
sectionStyling.panelOpen: When data-panel-open='true', sections become transparent (no background, border, or shadow)

updates: Panel icon (clones SVG from item or uses data-panel-icon)
Gradient header (if Dela AI or data-use-gradient-header='true')
withShellPanel.stateSync: Sets sidebar data-panel-open and item data-active

delaAIDetection.note: Special case handling for Dela AI items

iconCloning.method: Finds .left-sidebar__icon svg in clicked item, clones it, sizes to 20x20
iconCloning.fallback: If no SVG found, uses data-panel-icon to set data-icon-name attribute
iconCloning.hideIfEmpty: Hides icon container if no icon provided

defaultContent.method: If panel content area is empty, injects demo HTML
defaultContent.content: Shows panel title and placeholder text

implementationNotes: Hover expansion (52px to 220px) is CSS-only and applies to all themes (cp, vp, ppm, maconomy)
When panel is open (data-panel-open='true'), hover expansion is disabled - sidebar stays at 52px
Labels are hidden by default and shown on hover via CSS opacity/visibility transitions
Only items with data-panel-title trigger panel opening - others use default link behavior
Dela AI items automatically get gradient header regardless of data-use-gradient-header
Icon cloning preserves SVG structure but resizes for panel header
Active state is managed via both data-active attribute and class removal (left-sidebar__item--active)
Panel close handler listens for any [data-panel-close] button within left panel
State is cleared completely when panel closes (gradient, active items, sidebar state)
Section styling changes when panel is open (transparent background, no border/shadow)

_iconSourceMetadata.description: Icon source detection follows Icon.astro component logic: Heroicons first, then custom SVGs
